scholarships.title: Capgemini Exceller AgentifAI Buildathon
scholarships.description: The AgentifAI Buildathon gives students the opportunity to engage with real industry challenges, experience how AI is applied responsibly at scale, and interact with Capgemini’s technology and business experts. It is a learning‑led competition, where curiosity, clarity of thought, and execution come together.

scholarships.title: TenzorX 2026 National AI Hackathon
scholarships.description:
This competition by Poonawalla Fincorp aims to encourage participants to solve real-world business challenges through innovation, strategy, and technology. Teams will compete across multiple rounds where they will ideate, build, and present solutions to industry leaders.

Competition Rounds
Virtual Case Launch
The competition begins with a virtual session where Poonawalla Fincorp leaders introduce the problem statements and explain the expectations for participants.
Brief Submission
Teams submit their initial idea and execution plan based on the case brief, along with supporting documents or a video pitch.
Detailed Prototype Submission
Shortlisted teams submit a detailed presentation along with a functional prototype explaining their solution and approach.
Virtual Grand Finale
Finalist teams p...

scholarships.title: AI Research Fellowship
scholarships.description: Funding for students working on AI, machine learning, and data-driven research projects.

scholarships.title: Women in Product Scholarship
scholarships.description: Supports women students pursuing product, design, and software careers with mentorship and grants.

scholarships.title: Future Finance Leaders Grant
scholarships.description: Merit and need-based grant for students in finance, operations, and business strategy programs.

scholarships.title: Public Health Research Support
scholarships.description: Scholarship for life science and public health learners contributing to community health research.

scholarships.title: National Graduate Innovation Award
scholarships.description: Recognizes graduate students building innovative academic or startup-focused projects.

scholarships.title: Pan India Merit Access Scholarship
scholarships.description: A broad merit scholarship for strong students across engineering, sciences, and management.

scholarships.title: Cloud Career Accelerator Scholarship
scholarships.description: Scholarship for students building strong cloud, data, and database foundations for modern tech roles.

scholarships.title: Cyber Defense Excellence Grant
scholarships.description: Funding for engineering students exploring cyber security, ethical hacking, and systems defense research.

scholarships.title: Public Policy Futures Fellowship
scholarships.description: Supports students in governance, policy, and civic research with a grant and mentorship track.

scholarships.title: Young Entrepreneurs Growth Award
scholarships.description: Scholarship for management students interested in startups, analytics, and entrepreneurship development.

applications.statement: I am applying for TenzorX 2026 National AI Hackathon This scholarship would help me continue building my academic and career goals.
